durabilityviewer.configuration.armorArou: Renders the icons and durability of currently equipped armor on both sides of the hotbar.
durabilityviewer.configuration.effectDur: Displays the precise remaining time below the status effect icons in the top right corner.
durabilityviewer.configuration.hideDamag: Hides the durability info when an item's durability percentage is above this value (set to 100 to always show).
durabilityviewer.configuration.hudPositi: Sets the rendering position of the durability information on the screen (e.g., Top Left, Top Right, Center, etc.).
durabilityviewer.configuration.percentTo: When an item is heavily damaged (below this %), the display switches to 'amount of durability lost' to help track repair progress.
durabilityviewer.configuration.showAllTr: When enabled, displays durability for items in Trinkets/Curios mod slots in addition to the main hand and armor.
durabilityviewer.configuration.showExpec: On: Shows the average number of uses considering Unbreaking enchantments; Off: Shows raw durability values.
durabilityviewer.configuration.showFreeI: Displays the number of empty slots currently remaining in your inventory in real-time.
durabilityviewer.configuration.showInven: Displays the remaining durability value directly on the inventory icons.
durabilityviewer.configuration.showPerce: On: Displays remaining percentage (e.g., 80.5%); Off: Displays specific values (e.g., 1250).
durabilityviewer.configuration.soundBelo: Plays a warning sound when an item's remaining durability falls below this value.
Plays a warning sound when an item's remaining percentage falls below this value.
durabilityviewer.configuration.warningMo: Choose how to be notified when durability is low (e.g., sound only, visual flash only, or both).
